task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Honda CR-V (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $30920.00 and wholesale is $23600.00. Product features: Compact SUV with 1.5L turbocharged engine and Honda Sensing suite. Reference: https://automobiles.honda.com/cr-v

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Honda CR-V. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Honda CR-V. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
